body.prompt: A tarot card illustration for 'The Fool'. Masterpiece following the 'Gilded Shadow' design philosophy. Abyssal obsidian background, anchored by an opulent, meticulously crafted geometric gold border. Central symbol: A youthful traveler stepping at the edge of a cliff, carrying a bindle over one shoulder, holding a rose, with a small dog beside them beneath a radiant sun. No text, no words, no letters. Museum-quality, masterfully crafted.
